member.name: T:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Base.BaseController
member.remarks: Add CancellationToken cancellationToken to action parameters to support request cancellation (e.g. client disconnect). It is bound to by default.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Housing.ApartmentsController.DeleteRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a range of attachments by their IDs.
member.param: A collection of attachment IDs to delete.
A collection of attachment IDs to delete.
member.returns: An indicating the result of the operation.

member.summary: Deletes a range of attachments by their IDs.
member.param: A collection of attachment IDs to delete.
member.returns: An indicating the result of the operation.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Housing.CompanionsController.TryApplyRegistrationUserId(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Housing.Companion.AddCompanionDto,System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ActionResult{SonoBooking.Common.Core.IFinalResult}@)
member.summary: During registration there is no JWT; the client sends the new account id in the UserId header.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Housing.RequestsController.GetProjectReportData(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Reports.Requests.FilterRequestReportDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a project report based on the provided filter.
member.param: The filter containing report parameters.
Token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
member.returns: A PDF file containing the generated report.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Housing.RequestsController.BindRequestImagesFromFormFiles(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Housing.Request.AddRequestDto)
member.summary: ASP.NET sometimes fails to bind nested Images[n].Image files on large multipart bodies. Fall back to raw entries from the form file collection.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Housing.ReservationsController.GetReservationReportData(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Reports.Reservations.FilterReservationReportDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a reservation report based on the provided filter.
member.param: The filter containing report parameters.
Token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
member.returns: A PDF file containing the generated report.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Housing.RoomsController.DeleteRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a range of attachments by their IDs.
member.param: A collection of attachment IDs to delete.
A cancellation token.
member.returns: An indicating the result of the operation.

member.name: T:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController
member.summary: Controller for managing user accounts, including registration, login, and role updates.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Service for handling account-related operations.
Data of the currently logged-in user.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.#ctor(SonoBooking.Application.Services.Identity.Accounts.IAccountService,SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.User.UserDataDto)
member.summary: Controller for managing user accounts, including registration, login, and role updates.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Service for handling account-related operations.
Data of the currently logged-in user.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.RegisterAsync(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.User.RegisterDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new user with the provided details.
member.param: The registration details of the user.
member.returns: An containing a success message if the registration is successful, or a conflict response if the registration fails.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.CheckNationalIdExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks whether a national ID / document number is already registered.
member.param: The national ID or document number to check.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.LoginAsync(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.User.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and generates an access token and refresh token.
member.param: The login request containing the user's email and password.
member.returns: An containing a if the login is successful, or an unauthorized response if the login fails.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.ForgotPasswordAsync(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.User.ForgotPasswordRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resets the password for a user identified by email or username and emails the new password.
member.param: The identifier (email or username) of the account.
member.returns: A generic success message regardless of whether the account exists.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.Logout(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Logs out the user with the specified user ID.
member.returns: An IActionResult indicating the result of the logout operation.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.RefreshTokenAsync(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.User.RefreshTokenRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refreshes the access token and refresh token for the user.
member.param: The refresh token request containing user ID, access token, and refresh token.
member.returns: An containing a if successful, or an unauthorized response if the refresh operation fails.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.AccessTokenData
member.summary: Retrieves the data of the currently logged-in user from the access token.
member.returns: An containing the of the logged-in user.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.GetUserByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a user by their unique identifier.
member.returns: An containing the object if found, or a not found response if the user does not exist.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.GetAllUsersAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all users in the application.
member.returns: A list of users.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.GetAllPagedAsync(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Base.BaseParam{SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.User.FilterUserDto},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of users in the application.
member.returns: An containing a paginated list of users if found, or a not found response if no users exist.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.UpdateUserPersonalData(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.User.UpdateUserDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the personal data of the currently logged-in user.
member.param: The DTO containing the user's updated personal data.
member.returns: An indicating the result of the update operation. Returns a success message if the update is successful, or a bad request response if the operation fails.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.DelereUser(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a user by their unique identifier.
member.returns: An indicating whether the user was successfully removed.

member.name: T:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController
member.summary: Controller for managing roles in the application.

member.summary: Controller for managing roles in the application.

member.summary: Gets all roles in the application.
member.returns: A list of roles.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.GetPagedRolesAsync(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Base.BaseParam{SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.Roles.FilterRoleDto},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of users in the application.
member.returns: An containing a paginated list of roles if found, or a not found response if no users exist.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.GetRoleByIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a role by its ID.
member.returns: The role with the specified ID, or a not found result if the role does not exist.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.CreateRoleAsync(SonoBooking.Common.DTO.Identity.Roles.AddRoleDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new role in the application.
member.param: The role data transfer object containing role details.
member.returns: An ActionResult indicating the result of the role creation operation.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.DeleteRoleAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a role from the application.
member.returns: An IActionResult indicating the result of the delete operation.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Controllers.V1.Lookups.CitiesController.GetAllAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all cities. SuperAdmin may pass an optional governorate filter; other users are scoped by JWT governorate when the query is omitted.
member.param: Optional query: filter by governorate ID (e.g. ?governorateId=...).

member.remarks: This allows API versioning to define a Swagger document per API version after the service has been resolved from the service container.

member.name: T:SonoBooking.Api.Seed.DatabaseSeed
member.summary: Runs all database seed operations on startup.

member.name: M:SonoBooking.Api.Seed.DatabaseSeed.SeedIdentityAsync(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHost)
member.summary: Seed base role (SuperAdmin) and super user on startup.

member.summary: Seed lookup data from json files on startup.
